description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux distro build that runs on every push to master and tags matching v*, and on pull requests. Use concurrent jobs with cancellation for multiple Linux distributions: Fedora, OpenSUSE Leap, OpenSUSE Tumbleweed, ArchLinux, and ArchLinux (System). For each job, use a containerized environment, install git, checkout code with submodules, install dependencies, and run a build script.
